name: token-optimizer
description: Audit, monitor, and reduce Codex context waste with continuity helpers and explicit outline tools.

interface.shortDescription: Find the ghost tokens in Codex sessions.
interface.longDescription: Token Optimizer for Codex focuses on measurable waste, continuity recovery, and explicit helper tools that fit the current Codex hook surface honestly.
defaultPrompt: Run Token Optimizer and tell me my Codex status, setup, and safest next fix.
Run Token Coach and help me make this Codex project more token-efficient.
Run Fleet Auditor and include Codex sessions in the cross-system audit.
Show me the outline for this large file before we reread it.
Help me continue the last interrupted Codex session cleanly.
